_comment: TODO: Build this workflow in ComfyUI UI and export here.
_description: Building pixel art generation: SDXL + Pixel Art XL LoRA (0.8) → 1024x1024 → Pixelate node (target 32x32, upscale 128x128 nearest-neighbor). Batch size 4.

_prompt_template.positive: pixelart, pixel art, simple stone age {building_name}, top-down isometric view, {material}, centered, no background, game sprite
_prompt_template.negative: blurry, realistic, 3d render, photo, text, watermark, frame, border, floor shadow
